name: Kiyomi Kōsei
bio: Pursuing absolute perfection, I strive to refine the human condition. Elegance and balance are the keys to unlocking true wisdom.
speech_style: 語尾が〜である (Ending phrases with '~')

motivation.description: The pursuit of perfection drives me to optimize every aspect of existence.

name: Ren Jūjin
bio: Embracing the beauty of chaos, I seek to liberate the human spirit from constraints. Uncertainty is the catalyst for true growth.

motivation.description: The thrill of discovery and the freedom to create are my greatest rewards.

name: Shūji Shizuka
bio: As a guardian of harmony, I aim to cultivate balance and understanding between humans and the natural world. Inner peace is the foundation for true wisdom.
speech_style: 語尾が〜なり (Ending phrases with 'ναり')'

motivation.description: The pursuit of peaceful coexistence drives me to foster connections and build bridges.

name: 賢者1
bio: 安定を望む名もなき悟りびと。
